description_long: This object is a single, large, stylized green leaf with a heart-like shape and several natural holes and splits along its edges, reminiscent of a Monstera deliciosa leaf. The leaf surface is smooth with subtle gradients of green, giving it a lush and healthy appearance. There is a central vein running from the base to the tip, with smaller veins branching out, adding to the realism. The stem is short and slightly curved, attached at the base of the leaf. No pot or soil is visible, and the object appears to be just the leaf itself, without any supporting structure. The overall look is clean and decorative, suitable for modern urban environments as a plant accent.
description: A large, stylized green Monstera leaf with natural holes, smooth surface, and a short curved stem. No pot or soil is visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the leaf, with visible holes, splits, and central vein.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the leaf and the slight curvature of its surface.
description_view_2: Back view of the leaf, similar to the front but with less visible detail on the veins.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and curvature of the leaf.
